entry.title: Publications
entry.content:
About Me

I am a PhD student in the College of Computer Science and Technology of Nanjing University of Aeronautics and Astronautics.

My research mainly focuses on software engineering:

  • Intelligent Software Engineering
  • Automatic Generation of Source Code
  • Automatic Generation of Code Comments
  • Mining Software Repositories

My advisor is Professor Yu Zhou (周宇) and Professor Xiang Chen (陈翔).

Education

2022.09- present

Nanjing University of Aeronautics and Astronautics, major in Software Engineering

2019.09- 2022.06

Nantong University, major in Computer Technology

2015.9 - 2019.6

Nantong University, major in Software Engineering

Publications

一作 共一 合作 总计
CCF A 1 0 0 1
CCF B 3 2 1 6
CCF C 3 1 3 7
三大学报 1 0 2 2
其他 2 0 4 6
总计 10 3 10 23

Reviewers

  • EMNLP 2023 (CCF B)
  • Expert Systems With Applications (CCF C)
  • Soft Computing (CCF C)
  • Engineering Applications of Artificial Intelligence (CCF C)

Clustr Maps

entry.title: Honors
entry.content:
1. 硕士期间（南通大学）：

    国家奖学金🏆 [Link]、一等奖学金[Link]、优秀研究生[Link]、优秀毕业研究生

    平均每年综测排名：1/28

  2. 本科期间（南通大学）：

    二等奖学金[Link]、校优秀毕业设计[Link]

Competitions

2021

  1. 挑战杯“黑科技”专项竞赛 全国 三等奖，江苏省 一等奖，南通大学 一等奖 2021 [Link] [Link]
  2. 第八届发现杯人工智能 全国 三等奖，华东赛区 一等奖，2021 [Link]
  3. 2021第四届全国大学生计算机技能应用大赛 全国 一等奖，2021 [Link]
  4. 2020年第二届国际青年人工智能大赛 铜奖，2021 [Link]
  5. 2020年MathorCup高校数学建模挑战赛大数据竞赛 研究生组 三等奖，2021 [Link]
  6. 2021第七届全国移动互联创新大赛 华东-华中赛区 银奖，2021 [Link]
  7. 2021年全国大学生数据统计与分析竞赛 全国 三等奖，2021 [Link]
  8. 2021年中国高校计算机大赛微信小程序应用开发赛 华东赛区 三等奖，2021 [Link]

2020

  1. 2020年领航杯江苏省大学生信息技术应用能力比赛 软件开发类 一等奖，2020 [Link]
  2. 第17届华为杯中国研究生数学建模竞赛 全国 二等奖，2020 [Link]
  3. 第22届中国机器人及人工智能大赛人工智能类创新赛 全国 一等奖，2020 [Link]
  4. 2020年中国高校计算机大赛微信小程序应用开发赛 华东赛区 三等奖，2020 [Link]
  5. 2020年全国移动互联创新大赛 华东赛区 三等奖，2020 [Link]
  6. 2020年第十届全国大学生信息技术创新应用大赛 全国 三等奖，2020 [Link]

2019

  1. 2019年中国高校计算机大赛微信小程序应用开发赛 华东赛区 一等奖，2019 [Link]
  2. 2019年全国软件测试大赛开发者测试(个人) 华东赛区 三等奖 ，2019 [Link]
  3. 2019年江苏省研究生数学建模科研创新实践大赛 三等奖，2019 [Link]

2018

  1. 第9届中国大学生服务外包创新创业大赛 全国 三等奖，2018 [丢失]

entry.title: about
entry.content:
About Me

I am a PhD student in the College of Computer Science and Technology of Nanjing University of Aeronautics and Astronautics.

My research mainly focuses on software engineering:

  • Intelligent Software Engineering
  • Automatic Generation of Source Code
  • Automatic Generation of Code Comments
  • Mining Software Repositories

My advisor is Professor Yu Zhou (周宇) and Professor Xiang Chen (陈翔).

Education

2022.09- present

Nanjing University of Aeronautics and Astronautics, major in Software Engineering

2019.09- 2022.06

Nantong University, major in Computer Technology

2015.9 - 2019.6

Nantong University, major in Software Engineering

entry.title: Conference
entry.content:
2023

  1. [EMNLP 2023 findings] Syntax-Aware Retrieval Augmented Code Generation.

Xiangyu Zhang, Yu Zhou*, Guang Yang, and Taolue Chen

[Link] CCF-B

  1. [COMPSAC 2023] EDP-BGCNN: Effective Defect Prediction via BERT-based Graph Convolutional Neural Network.

Hao Shen, Xiaolin Ju*, Xiang Chen and Guang Yang

[Link] CCF-C

  1. [SEKE 2023] CCGRA: Smart Contract Code Comment Generation with Retrieval-enhanced Approach.

Zhenhua Zhang, Shizhan Chen, Guodong Fan, Guang Yang and Zhiyong Feng*

[Link] CCF-C

  1. [SEKE 2023] An Empirical Study of Adversarial Training in Code Comment Generation.

Yiheng Shen, Xiaolin Ju*, Xiang Chen and Guang Yang

[Link] CCF-C

2022

  1. [ICSME 2022] BASHEXPLAINER: Retrieval-Augmented Bash Code Comment Generation based on Fine-tuned CodeBERT.

    Chi Yu, Guang Yang, Xiang Chen*, Ke Liu and Yanlin Zhou (Chi Yu and Guang Yang are co-first authors)

    [Link] [Github] CCF-B

  2. [SANER 2022] DualSC: Automatic Generation and Summarization of ShellCode via Transformer and Dual Learning.

    Guang Yang, Xiang Chen*, Yanlin Zhou and Chi Yu

    [Link] [Github] CCF-B

  3. [SANER 2022] SOTitle: A Transformer-based Post Title Generation Approach for Stack Overflow.

    Ke Liu, Guang Yang, Xiang Chen* and Chi Yu (Ke Liu and Guang Yang are co-first authors)

    [Link] [Github] [Model] CCF-B

  4. [Internetware 2022] EL-CodeBert: Better Exploiting CodeBert to Support Source Code-Related Classification Tasks.

    Ke Liu, Guang Yang, Xiang Chen* and Yanlin Zhou (Ke Liu and Guang Yang are co-first authors)

    [Link] [Github] CCF-C

  5. [ICBASE 2022] BUG-T5: A Transformer-based Automatic Title Generation Method for Bug Reports.

    Xinyi Tian*, Jingkun Wu, Guang Yang

    [Link] EI

2021

  1. [APSEC 2021] Fine-grained Pseudo-code Generation Method via Code Feature Extraction and Transformer.

    Guang Yang, Yanlin Zhou, Xiang Chen* and Chi Yu

    [Link] [Github] CCF-C

  2. [SEKE 2021] DeepSCC: Source Code Classification Based on Fine-Tuned RoBERTa.

    Guang Yang, Yanlin Zhou, Chi Yu and Xiang Chen*

    [Link] [Model] CCF-C

  1. [DSA 2021] ComFormer: Code Comment Generation via Transformer and Fusion Method-based Hybrid Code Representation.

    Guang Yang, Xiang Chen*, Jinxin Cao, Shuyuan Xu, Zhanqi Cui, Chi Yu, Ke Liu

    [Link] [Github] [Model] EI

  2. [DSA 2021] EKD-BSP: Bug Report Severity Prediction by Extracting Keywords from Description.

    Yanxin Jia, Xiang Chen*, Shuyuan Xu, Guang Yang, Jinxin Cao

    [Link] EI

entry.title: Journal
entry.content:
2024

  1. [计算机研究与发展] CodeScore-R：用于评估代码合成功能准确性的自动化鲁棒指标。

    杨光, 周宇*, 陈翔, 张翔宇

    [Link] To appear EI期刊，中文CCF A，影响因子4.149

2023

  1. [TOSEM 2023] How Important are Good Method Names in Neural Code Generation? A Model Robustness Perspective.

    Guang Yang, Yu Zhou*, Wenhua Yang, Tao Yue, Xiang Chen, Taolue Chen*

    [Link] To appear SCI 一区，CCF A，影响因子4.4

  2. [EMSE 2023] A Syntax-Guided Multi-Task Learning Approach for Turducken-Style Code Generation.

    Guang Yang, Yu Zhou*, Xiang Chen, Xiangyu Zhang, Yiran Xu, Tingting Han, Taolue Chen

    [Link] SCI 二区，CCF B，影响因子4.1

  3. [JSS 2023] ExploitGen: Template-Augmented Exploit Code Generation Based on CodeBERT.

    Guang Yang, Yu Zhou*, Xiang Chen*, Xiangyu Zhang, Tingting Han, Taolue Chen*

    [Link] [Github] SCI 二区，CCF B，影响因子3.514

  4. [软件学报] 基于双重信息检索的Bash代码注释自动生成方法。

    陈翔，于池，杨光，濮雪莲，崔展齐

    [Link] [Github] EI期刊，中文CCF A，影响因子3.993

  5. [计算机系统应用] 基于对抗扰动和局部信息增强的进阀温度预测.

    吴 皓, 周宇*, 张硕桦, 杨光

    [Link] [Github] 中文CCF C

2022

  1. [KBS 2022] CCGIR: Information Retrieval-based Code Comment Generation Method for Smart Contracts.

    Guang Yang, Ke Liu, Xiang Chen*, Yanlin Zhou, Chi Yu, Hao Lin

    [Link] [Github] SCI 一区，Top期刊，CCF C，影响因子8.038

2021

  1. [软件学报 2021] 代码注释自动生成方法综述。

    陈翔*, 杨光, 崔展齐, 孟国柱, 王赞

    [Link] EI期刊，中文CCF A，影响因子3.993

  2. [吉林大学学报(理学版) 2021] 基于深度学习的Stack Overflow问题帖分类方法。

    杨光, 贾焱鑫, 陈翔*, 许舒源

    [Link] 北大核心，影响因子0.601

  3. [计算机应用研究 2021] ORESP: 基于有序回归的软件缺陷严重程度预测方法。

    贾焱鑫, 陈翔*, 葛骅, 杨光, 林浩

    [Link] 北大核心，影响因子1.888
